leadText: Watercress (Japanese: クレソン Watercress) is a type of ingredient introduced in Generation IX.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] It can be used as an ingredient in making a sandwich .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V A very bitter ingredient that stands out among veggies for its quirky flavor. People tend to either like it or not like it—they rarely sit on the fence.

sections.title: In the core series games

People tend to either like it or not like it—they rarely sit on the fence.
